images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese gravure idol lounging amidst the chaotic luxury of a messy, plush bed, embodying a playful yet seductive nightlife vibe. She is wearing a daring, high-cut swimsuit in sleek black fabric that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, the high leg openings elongating her curves. Perched on white sunglasses with the lens tilted to reveal the reflection, she sticks her tongue out cheekily, holding a melting ice cream cone close to her lips, droplets threatening to fall. The background is a soft, dreamy bokeh of glowing fairy lights, creating a bright, fairy-tale atmosphere without dark shadows. Her skin texture is flawless, showing tiny pores and glowing vitality. The image captures a candid, intimate moment of interaction, shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, utilizing depth of field, ray tracing, and global illumination, all bathed in the nostalgic, warm tones of Kodak Portra 400 film stock.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
